title: Citrusy Chewy Filipino Chicken Noodles
description: A halal-friendly Filipino dish featuring brown rice noodles, tandoor chicken, and a burst of citrus flavors, perfect for a date night. This recipe combines the tender chew of brown rice noodles with the rich flavors of tandoor chicken and a zesty citrus sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together tandoor spice mix, olive oil, garlic, and chicken. Mix well to coat.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, if desired. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
Cook the brown rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together orange juice and lemon juice.
In a large skillet, combine the cooked noodles, citrus sauce, and chopped green onions. Toss to combine.
Slice the cooked chicken into bite-sized pieces and add to the skillet. Toss to combine.
Garnish with additional green onions, if desired.
